/usr/bin/ar qc libimgui.a CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/deps/ImGui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/deps/ImGui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/deps/ImGui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/deps/ImGui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/deps/ImGui/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/deps/ImGui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgui.a
